author: sleepyhauru
description: Owner-only tools to export a server's emojis and stickers into the bot's data folder and import them into another server later.
install_msg: GuildAssets installed. Load it with [p]load guildassets, then use [p]guildassets export in the source server and [p]guildassets import <source_guild_id> in the destination server.
short: Export and import a guild's emojis and stickers.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores exported guild emoji and sticker files along with their names and metadata until you delete them.
